title: Deep Learning: Build Real Things
modules: What Deep Learning Actually Is (Skip the Hype)
How Neural Networks Learn: The Intuition Behind the Math
Your First Model: Hands-On in 30 Minutes
Computer Vision — Teaching Machines to See
Natural Language Processing — Teaching Machines to Read
Training, Testing, and Knowing When Your Model Fails
Tools of the Trade: PyTorch, Hugging Face, and Free GPUs
Build Something Real: Your Own Mini Deep Learning Project
synopsis: Deep learning is what powers the AI tools everyone is talking about — and you can start building with it without a PhD or expensive hardware. This course gives you the conceptual foundation and hands-on experience to go from curious to capable.
rationale: As AI becomes infrastructure, young builders who understand deep learning fundamentals — not just how to prompt tools — will have a massive advantage in technical careers and entrepreneurship.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can train and evaluate a basic deep learning model, understand how major AI systems work under the hood, and know where to go next to specialize.
source_signals: Tracing the thoughts of a large language model
Machine Learning 101 slidedeck: 2 years of headbanging, so you don't have to
